title: Show HN: Fast, native Mac file manager (filters, fuzzy find, 9 MB, no Electron)
summary: 一款基于.NET/C#和AppKit的原生macOS文件管理器，支持模糊搜索、双面板、批量重命名和图片转换，体积仅9MB。
translated_summary: A native macOS file manager built with .NET/C# and AppKit, featuring fuzzy search, dual-pane view, batch rename, image conversion, and a 9 MB footprint.
